phrases.english: I wonder if you could give me some time on Monday
It would be really helpful if you could call Joan today.

I'd appreciate it if you could provide us with a quote by tommorow.
Would you mind if we postponed the conference call until next week?
Would it be alright if I called you after lunch?
Is there any chance that we could review the figures once more?
I'd rather we finished the job before the weekend.
I haven't seen Jeff enter the building yet.
Have you seen Kazuo come back yet?
I heard the bell ring when I pushed it.
I felt the table move, so I think we need to get it fixed.
I have noticed a few people entering the room
Have you listened to any customers complaining about the delay?
I don't want to see anybody blaming themselves for this problem.
We looked at the prototype being built last month.
We sould make them return the samples by Friday.
I'll make the person in charge check the data immediately.
We're going to have the US office check the data.
Please have Mr.Dodds call me when he gets back.
Are you going to let the clients taste some samples beforehand?
We've decided to let XY Company manufacture the parts for us.
I'll help you clean up.
Have you got the new equipment to work yet?
It is important for us to move on from this mistake.
It is vital that we take this opportunity now.
It is uncertain whether we should proceed with this job at this time.
It can't be decided at this stage whether we were correct or not.
It is the budget that I cannot agree with.
It was the latest figures that made me decide on the new contract.
It was the problems with communication that created this misunderstanding.
It was because of the financial crisis that we closed that section.
How about changing the section where the company logo appears?
Can we put the memo on the wall where everybody can see it?
I remember the time when we worked together to make a success.
How about interviewing them about the day when they first met?
I'd like to show you why Greensboro would be the best location.
Can I show you the reason why the bigger one is better?
This is how I prepared for the promotion exam.
Mr. Mishima can show you how you should reprogram the device.
My friend Emiko, who lives in China, is coming to the party tomorrow.
A friend, who is on holiday in Italy, sent me some pictures.
This family, who I met in Canada, is going to visit Japan this summer.
I have a friend whose father is a musician.
Can I invite some of my friends whose hobby is fishing?
Can you ask her what she wants for her birthday?
My children remember what I said better than I thought.
These days, I let my son do what he wants to do.
You should book a room which is easy to get to.
Try to decide the design which is best for our customers.
Show me the list of the new products that will be launched next year.
Let me know the people who ordered the parts last week.
Let me know the name of the representative who visited our area.
Let me know the name of the representative (who) you met at the trade show.
You should use the same company (that) you used last year.
Let me know the companies (which) we've contacted before.
Would you like some coffee while waiting?
I'd like to introduce you to my colleague, Sarah Jackson.
Would you like to speak to Ms. Hayama?
Would you like me to e-mail it to you?
I'd rather schedule an afternoon meeting.
Would you mind signing the document here?
Would you mind my asking who's calling?
I wouldn't mind calling later.
Aren't you going to meet Gordon tonight?
Isn't there an attachment with this e-mail?
Weren't you at the meeting on Tuesday?
Aren't any changes needed?
Why don't you hold a welcome party for her?
Won't Jeff come to the New Year party?
Wouldn't you like to join us for drinks after work?
Couldn't this wait until Monday?
Tommy is in the Paris office today, isn't he?
Kathy is taking care of the translation, isn't she?
You're going to talk about robotics, aren't you?
You got permission from the client, didn't you?
Jim will join us later, won't he?
You haven't sent the data yet, have you?
The Yokohama office could not achieve their sales goal, could they?
We haven't received the final cost yet, have we?
I think it is difficult for us to meet the deadline.
It is no problem for us to finish on time.
Is it possible to make an appointment?
I would like to ask for a little more time.
We need to reserve a conference room.
We're going to decide how to deal with this problem by Friday.
I'm not sure what to do next.
Could you tell me where to go on the day?
What is the most important thing to do today?
We don't have time to hold the interview this week.
Do you have time to talk about tomorrow's schedule?
Do you have anything to add?
Should I bring anything to drink?
Is there anywhere to stay near here?
Are there any letters to post?
Is there enough time to use the restroom?
I'm here to see Mr. Davis.
I'm here today to introduce our latest model.
I'm calling to confirm the appointment time next week.
Who are you here to see?
I'd like to visit you sometime next week to introduce our new lineup.
I'm very pleased to see you again.
I'm really glad to hear that.
I'd be happy to come to your office.
It won't be easy to cut costs by 8%.
I don't think it is possible to agree with your proposal.
We can agree to increase production for July.
I think we need to discuss this more carefully.
We should describe how to use it in more detail.
We should take more time to collect data.
To be honest, I think we should start again.
To tell the truth, I don't think this plan will work well.
Continuing with this system is not a good idea.
Learning from our mistakes is the best way forward.
I believe building a relationship with Cross Company would benefit us.
I think we should start creating a new strategy.
We have to finish collecting data first.
We must avoid leaving this situation as it is.
It's no use trying to change their mind.
I think it's worth interviewing some experts.
We like showing visitors around.
We've enjoyed learning more about your company.
I'm looking forward to seeing you again.
I've been looking forward to meeting you.
I hope you had no problems finding us.
Thank you very much for having us.
Please let me apologize for being late.
I'm sorry for not introducing myself sooner.
Their menu should be interesting.
There is an exciting after-dinner performance.
They have a fascinating choice of sake from all over Japan.
I recommend the grilled fish and steamed vegetables.
Have you tried the fried fish?
This is the restaurant suggested by Mr. Ono.
It's a restaurant serving Japanese food.
You can also choose from the menu hanging on the wall.
I'm exhausted from the trade show today.
I was excited by the fireworks by the river last night.
Did you see the amazing goal in the soccer game yesterday?
Did you notice the fallen yen yesterday?
The frozen footpaths can be dangerous, so please take care.
The man wearing the navy-blue suit is Mr. Harris.
I heard the wind blowing hard last night.
We were really busy preparing for the celebration party last year.
Is it possible to complete the task sooner?
I'll explain a more difficult job.
It would be better to check with head office first.
Could you prepare the larger one of the two?
This program performs the fastest of all.
You shouldn't purchase the cheapest ink for the printer.
This is the most efficient way to check the files.
You'll have to find the best way to input this data.
This process is as important as the next one.
I think the new software is as easy to use as the old one.
Could we collect as much information as possible?
We should leave as soon as Mr. Dexter arrives.
We have to find the right person as soon as possible.
I'm afraid this design is not as unique as the last one.
I'm afraid this way is less productive than the others.
Could we source the paper from the least expensive company?
I enjoyed my trip more than last year.
I enjoyed my trip much more than last year.
There were more people than usual on the beach.
There were a little more people than usual on the beach.
I heard you got by far the highest score.
I heard you got the second highest score.
It took twice as long as usual because of the heavy traffic.
It was the most beautiful sea I have ever seen.
We are expected to be at work by eight-thirty.
ID cards are issued to all visitors at reception.
Ongoing jobs are placed in the "current" folder.
Make sure the cabinet is locked when leaving the office.
Some new tasks will be assigned to you after you complete the training.
Parking spaces cannot be reserved in advance.
You will be allowed ten days leave for summer vacation.
Our ID cards must be punched when we arrive at work.
Is the front entrance closed at ten P.M.?
Will the new stationery be delivered by tomorrow?
When will we be given our new assignments?
Who will be assigned to our group?
The new catalog is now being printed.
You can't use the elevator now because it's being checked.
I've been asked to deliver the presentation.
Has the train been delayed?
What a coincidence!
What pleasant news about Alice!
How cold it is today!
How excited I am about next week's trip!
What rain we had last night!
What wonderful weather we are having!
How good it was to see you!
How interesting to hear we went to the same college!
I often play at the country club.
I work out at a gym twice a week.
We jog in the park after work every Thursday.
We swam in the sea at Palm Bay.
We went for lunch at Maloney's.
Do you often jog before going to work?
Did you go to the concert last week?
Did you stay at the Hyatt Hotel?
It was nice meeting you today.
This is our new branch manager, David.
Are you free in the morning?
I will be available from lunchtime.
I will be busy next week.
Three o'clock sounds good.
My schedule looks good tomorrow.
You are looking well.
I've just opened the file.
I've received a reply from Mr. Burns.
We will visit the factory this Friday.
We have to prepare some more stationery.
The engineer fixed the copy machine this morning.
Ms. Ramirez sent the replacement parts last week.
Have you read the manual yet?
Has Max finished the design?
We've been using this format since we introduced this system.
Please wait until the person in charge comes here.
Ms. Davis will call us as soon as she gets back to her office.
Please call the manufacturer if you have a problem.
You don't have to call the manufacturer unless you have a problem.
Store these files on the server so that we can review them later.
Make sure you return the file in case I need it today.
Even if you think the data is correct, please ask Jim to check it.
You can enter the building while the lights are on.
Turn right when you see the library.
Could you call me when you arrive at Central Station?
Our office is on the left when you turn into South Street.
The Kato Building is on the right, before you come to the convenience store.
Before you take the elevator, please sign in at reception.
After you reach the second traffic light, turn left.
As soon as you see the freeway, turn right.
Please keep the office tidy.
Can you color these boxes red?
We named the new model the CX.
Please make it easier for everyone to access the information.
Make constant improvements to keep the customers satisfied.
I hope you'll find this task interesting.
We will have to make the waiting room barrier-free.
We're going to have the office remodeled next year.
I want you to find the contact details for Ms. Funabashi.
I'd like you to deliver a speech at the ceremony.
I need Mary to stay a little later tonight.
Could you tell Harry to arrange the meeting for Friday?
Will you permit me to leave early today?
Would you allow us to extend the deadline?
Can I expect you to complete the task on time?
Can I ask you to prepare the meeting room?
My wife bought me this pen.
Paul made his father a birthday card.
Ryan cooked his friends a meal.
My daughter made me my lunch.
I wrote my grandmother a thank you card.
Minako told me a heartwarming story about her son.
I heard Sarah got her mother a pendant.
Did you give Alex a new watch?
I think that the only option is to continue with the current plan.
I agree with the idea that we should introduce the new system.
I suggest we meet on Friday because we need to make a final check.
We should open on Saturday mornings since many customers have requested this.
We should delay the vote since two members of the board are not here yet.
We need to replace this hardware as it is now out of date.
Although some people are yet to agree, I think we should change the vendor.
Even if we cannot make the deadline, we should still aim for the fifteenth.
They are going to reach their sales target with no problem.
A new cafe is going to open near the station.
It will rain tomorrow afternoon.
The lunch room will be closed for one week.
The World Cup starts tomorrow.
A typhoon is coming, so please take care.
The office is closing in fifteen minutes.
My whole family is leaving for Toronto in three days.
We can finish the job by the end of the week.
Ms. Suzuki can't make the meeting today.
We couldn't predict this stock shortage.
Visitors are able to see our latest catalog.
We were not able to make much progress today.
This can cause a serious server error.
This kind of error can't happen anymore.
She may know the results of the questionnaire.
Can you let me know when you finish?
Can you show me how to use this file?
Will you help me for a minute?
Could you meet us after the event?
Would you answer the phone while I'm out?
Can I borrow a copy of the document?
Could we extend the deadline?
May I ask your opinion on this task?
Mr. Harrison will be late.
Mr. Kimura will be able to call you back after three o'clock.
Ms. Kanai won't be able to call you back by the end of today.
She may be back soon.
It may take a few minutes to reach him.
Could you repeat that, please?
May I ask what this is concerning?
May I have your name, please?
You have to be here before nine.
You must attend the lecture meeting in May.
You don't have to fill in this column.
You mustn't put this information on our website.
You should try to finish before the thirty-first.
You shouldn't worry about the deadline.
Shall I make an appointment?
Shall we move to our next topic?
I'm making arrangements for tomorrow's trip.
She's getting ready to give the presentation now.
Are you already working on it?
Is he still calculating the cost?
I was checking some documents at that time.
The finance department was preparing the receipts yesterday afternoon.
Was she meeting with the CEO this morning?
What were they talking about in the meeting?
We have lived in Seattle for fifteen years.
Max and I have known each other since elementary school.
My family and I have been to the States on vacation.
I've taken my family to that restaurant before.
I've tried Japanese shogi with my colleagues.
I've just heard the news of his marriage.
My children have gotten used to their new school.
We've already booked a sightseeing bus tour.
I haven't had a chance to try Korean food yet.
I haven't decided where to go on holiday yet.
We've not been to the west of Japan for several years.
Marcus has not played tennis for many years.
I've never tried this kind of sport before.
Have you ever been to a classical concert?
Have you visited the exhibition at the national gallery yet?
How long have you been learning to dance?

Have you finished the report yet?
Have you had any trouble finding the data?
We haven't experienced any problems in the past.
We've come up with a few problems.
Has Mr. Ozaki called yet?
I've been calling a number of clients about the changes.
We've been dealing with ABC Inc. for many years.
I'll help you out in the afternoon.
The sales conference will be held next week.
There will be time for questions after the speech.
Will you have any free time after the event?
When will the document be ready?
I'm going to be in London from the twenty-seventh.
We're going to hold a meeting after lunch.
Is everything going to be ready in time?

meetingPhrases.japanese: 私の研究は、異文化間コミュニケーションにおけるソーシャルロボットの役割について調べています。
meetingPhrases.english: My research investigates the role of social robots in cross-cultural communication.
meetingPhrases.context: 研究テーマを紹介する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: この研究は、Clark & Brennanの共通基盤理論に基づいています。
meetingPhrases.english: This study is grounded in Clark and Brennan's theory of common ground.
meetingPhrases.context: 理論的背景を説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 共通基盤とは、会話の参加者が共有している知識のことです。
meetingPhrases.english: Common ground refers to the mutual knowledge shared among conversational participants.
meetingPhrases.context: 共通基盤を定義する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 正統的周辺参加の概念は、グループへの段階的な参加プロセスを説明しています。
meetingPhrases.english: The concept of legitimate peripheral participation describes the gradual process of becoming a full member of a community.
meetingPhrases.context: LPPを説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 私たちの研究では、ユーモアを異文化間コミュニケーションの課題として検討しています。
meetingPhrases.english: In our study, we examine humor as a challenge in cross-cultural communication.
meetingPhrases.context: 研究の焦点を説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: ユーモアは、成功するには共有された文化的文脈を必要とします。
meetingPhrases.english: Humor requires shared cultural context to be successful.
meetingPhrases.context: ユーモアの特性を説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 私たちは「解説的ツッコミ」を行うロボットを提案しています。
meetingPhrases.english: We propose a robot that performs what we call 'explanatory tsukkomi.'
meetingPhrases.context: ロボットのデザインを紹介する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: ツッコミとは、日本の漫才におけるボケへのツッコミを指します。
meetingPhrases.english: Tsukkomi refers to the straight-man role in Japanese manzai comedy that responds to the funny-man's jokes.
meetingPhrases.context: ツッコミを説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: このロボットは、参加者が共有していない文化的文脈を説明します。
meetingPhrases.english: The robot explains cultural context that participants may not share.
meetingPhrases.context: ロボットの機能を説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 私たちの仮説は、ロボットの介入がユーモアの理解を促進するというものです。
meetingPhrases.english: Our hypothesis is that robot intervention facilitates humor comprehension.
meetingPhrases.context: 仮説を述べる時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 予備的な知見によると、この効果は特に語学学習者において顕著でした。
meetingPhrases.english: Preliminary findings suggest this effect is particularly pronounced among language learners.
meetingPhrases.context: 初期結果を報告する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 私たちは、感情的な接地（アフェクティブグラウンディング）という概念を探求しています。
meetingPhrases.english: We are exploring the concept of affective grounding in communication.
meetingPhrases.context: 研究の方向性を説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: この研究の実用的な応用としては、異文化間の職場環境での活用が考えられます。
meetingPhrases.english: Practical applications of this research include deployment in multicultural workplace settings.
meetingPhrases.context: 応用を議論する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 本研究の限界として、サンプルサイズが比較的小さいことが挙げられます。
meetingPhrases.english: A limitation of this study is the relatively small sample size.
meetingPhrases.context: 研究の限界を認める時

meetingPhrases.japanese: 今後の研究では、異なる文化的背景を持つ参加者を対象に検証する予定です。
meetingPhrases.english: Future work will validate these findings with participants from diverse cultural backgrounds.
meetingPhrases.context: 今後の展望を述べる時

meetingPhrases.japanese: この方法論を詳しく説明させてください。
meetingPhrases.english: Let me elaborate on the methodology we employed.
meetingPhrases.context: 方法論を詳しく説明する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: ご質問に関してですが、私たちは両方のアプローチを検討しました。
meetingPhrases.english: Regarding your question, we considered both approaches.
meetingPhrases.context: 質問に答える時

meetingPhrases.japanese: この結果は、私たちの最初の予測と一致しています。
meetingPhrases.english: These results are consistent with our initial predictions.
meetingPhrases.context: 結果を解釈する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: この研究分野に関する先行研究はかなり限られています。
meetingPhrases.english: Prior work in this specific area has been quite limited.
meetingPhrases.context: 研究のギャップを指摘する時

meetingPhrases.japanese: これまでのところ、結果は私たちのアプローチが有望であることを示唆しています。
meetingPhrases.english: So far, the results suggest that our approach shows promise.
meetingPhrases.context: 全体的な結論を述べる時
